2. (Deprecated) Submit a URL directly to urlscan.io
Submits a URL to urlscan.io.
This command is deprecated, but will still work if it is used in a playbook.
Base Command
urlscan-submit
Input
Argument Name
name: urlscan-submit

outputs.description: URLs related to the scanned URL URLScan.RelatedIPs IPs related to the scanned URL
outputs.name: URLScan.URLs

outputs.description: ASNs related to the scanned URL URLScan.Countries Countries associated with the scanned URL
outputs.name: URLScan.RelatedASNs

outputs.description: IOCs found for the scanned URL URLScan.Subdomains Associated subdomains for the url scanned
outputs.name: URLScan.relatedhashes

outputs.description: ASN of the URL scanned URLScan.Data URL of the file found
outputs.name: URLScan.ASN

outputs.description: Vendor reporting the malicious indicator for the file URLScan.Malicious.Description Description of the malicious indicator
outputs.name: URLScan.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: SHA256 of file found URLScan.File.FileName File name of file found
outputs.name: URLScan.File.Hash

outputs.description: File type of the file found URLScan.File.Hostname URL where the file was found
outputs.name: URLScan.File.FileType

outputs.description: Certificates found for the scanned URL
outputs.name: URLScan.Certificates
